vizag_replay.name: Vizag 2025 Replay
vizag_replay.description: Recreates the conditions that led to the Vizag Steel Plant explosion: gas pressure warnings + maintenance bypass + hot work permit in coke oven battery
vizag_replay.expected_alert: COMPOUND_RISK: Hot work + gas accumulation + maintenance in Z01

confined_space_near_miss.name: Confined Space Near-Miss
confined_space_near_miss.description: Simulates O2 depletion in a confined space entry scenario with simultaneous H2S presence
confined_space_near_miss.expected_alert: COMPOUND_RISK: Unsafe oxygen + toxic gas during confined space entry

gas_leak_cascade.name: Gas Leak Cascade
gas_leak_cascade.description: Simulates a CO gas leak that spreads from Coke Oven to adjacent zones
gas_leak_cascade.expected_alert: CRITICAL: CO gas leak spreading across multiple zones

fire_scenario.name: Fire in Gas Holder Area
fire_scenario.description: Simulates a fire starting in the Gas Holder Area with rapid temperature rise and pressure increase
fire_scenario.expected_alert: FIRE + EXPLOSION risk in Gas Holder Area

maintenance_mishap.name: Maintenance LOTO Failure
maintenance_mishap.description: Simulates a LOTO failure where equipment is returned to service while maintenance is still in progress
maintenance_mishap.expected_alert: Critical equipment returned to service during active maintenance
